questions.clue: In 1836 William Travis wrote "the people of Texas & all Americans in the world" to get some help at this landmark; too late
In 1862 he played Richard III in New York City but 3 years later, broke a leg onstage in a much more horrifying way
After meeting his Waterloo, Napoleon failed in a plan to head to America in July 1815 & was exiled to this "holy" island

Independence, Missouri & the Willamette River Valley were the start & end points of this emigration route; we don't have dysentery stats
Marx your calendars!  1848 was the year this pamphlet began ominously with "A spectre is haunting Europe"
Don't be fooled by the cute name: these debris clumps under your furniture can clog electronics & cause respiratory problems
Whether green or white, the edible shoots of this vegetable are called spears
Fittingly, the Seth Rogen comedy "This Is the End" was the last-ever rental at a company-run one of these stores
Un-capitalizing the name of this month gives you a word meaning grand or majestic
Are your ears ringing?  Maybe someone's talking about you!  But the more likely culprit is this medical affliction
I'm a proud non-smoker, but why are these "ships of the desert" in a caravan when a pack of them would have been spot on?
A bunch of turkeys seems perfect, but they collectivize as a this, a group gathered by a sheriff to go after Old West bad guys
A neck of these African beasts would have almost been as appropriate as a tower of them is
A hypnosis of cobras would have been pretty cool to say, but the slitherers group as a this, a long case that holds arrows
Damon Albarn led a band of them that ends with a "Z"; these primates band together as well, but we'd go with a magilla
Hello, sailor!  Horatio Magellan are the given names of this cereal mascot who commands the S.S. Guppy

Jayden Daniels "capitalized" & won the 2024 AP NFL Offensive Rookie of the Year playing for this team
Examples of this harsh 2-word penalty include flogging, last carried out by the U.S. justice system in Delaware in 1952
PMI, short for this, may be required if you take out a home loan & pay less than 20% of the purchase price
Caraway seeds are added to the dough before kneading when making this bread, the standard for a Reuben sandwich
Your falafel will taste better if this pocket bread is freshly baked (& it only takes about 4 minutes to knead & 3 minutes in the oven)
From the French for "rod", this long & narrow loaf is great for a po-boy

After you knead the dough for this Jewish bread that's traditional for Shabbat, you start braiding it; bake until golden
There are a total of 3 C's in the name of this Italian bread that can be made with minimal (or even no!) kneading

"Near, far, wherever you are, I believe that the heart does go on, once more, you open the door... & my heart will go on & on"

"Confronted all the dope fiends, if there was a problem, yo, I'll solve it, check out the hook while my DJ revolves it"

"What I got, you got to give it to your mama... give it away, give it away, give it away now, give it away, give it away, give it away now"

final.clue: A 2017 exhibit devoted to this novel on its 60th anniversary featured a giant map labeled "Hitch-Hiking Trip"

A setback that later leads to a great outcome is one of these "in disguise"
A business opportunity too good to be true or some foods mentioned in the book of Leviticus may not be this
Hindu belief led to this phrase meaning a person or idea that no one dares criticize
My friend Ed reads the sports pages, Roxane Gay's Substack & especially the New Testament this way, with regularity
It's an event no human could have prevented, & it may not be covered by your insurance
A predatory bird is staring right at you on the cover of Helen MacDonald's acclaimed 2016 book "H Is for" this
Giving away the plot, a cover of the 2001 novel "Life of Pi" shows a boat whose passengers are a boy & this animal
S. Neil Fujita's designs include one that looks like a drop of you-know-what for the cover of this Truman Capote book
A haunting paperback cover of a 1979 V.C. Andrews book shows a girl gazing out of the window of this room
Patti Smith used a photo booth pic she took in 1969 with this photographer for the paperback cover of her 2010 memoir "Just Kids"
Similar to the Pride Flag, the logo for KGAY 106.5 FM in Palm Springs also features the colors of this
Known as "The Vine", KVYN is an FM music station that broadcasts from this famed California valley
Sound it out, if it helps: WZLY, a college radio station, serves the school whose alums include this first lady
Borrowing its name from a local delicacy, 105.9 KPOI serves this state capital
This 4-letter Texas city is home to a country radio station whose call letters spell the city's name

So these creatures don't normally age & die... unless they get their version of progeria, like David Bowie in "The Hunger"
